meaning: n.[植]三色紫罗兰,<俚>脂粉气男子,同性恋男子
examples: A series of smaller terraces lining the east and west of the square will be adorned with local flowers such as Chrysanthemum and pansy.
Pansy asked which sections they would have.
The colorful pansy is the flower of Osaka, Japan.
He planted the pansy on the nearest patch of grass to the shopping centre.
Pansy Ho, the daughter of Macau gambling tycoon Stanley Ho, serves on Sotheby's international advisory board .
